case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS. BEVERLY MCGRIEF et al

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT AGAINST BEVERLY MCGRIEF ADMINISTRATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF EDWARD LEWIS MCGRIFF FOR FAILURE TO SATISFY CREDITORS CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MCGRIEF, BEVERLY ADMINISTRATRIX OF THE ESTATE OF EDWARD LEWIS MCGRIFF DOES ONE THROUGH FIFTY INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-04-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-20-2006

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MCGRIEF, BEVERLY ADMINISTRATRIX OF THE ESTATE OF EDWARD LEWIS MCGRIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-04-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGRIEF, BEVERLY ADMINISTRATRIX OF THE ESTATE OF EDWARD LEWIS MCGRIFF $62,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $62,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
